summary: Markets exhibit cautious optimism amid geopolitical tensions boosting commodities like Brent Crude and Gold, while crypto shows resilience through institutional accumulation despite technical hurdles for ETH. Forex pairs like EUR/USD remain neutral-to-bullish pending key data, with stocks and Bitcoin consolidating positively. Overall sentiment leans bullish for energy and safe-havens but mixed elsewhere.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: DegenDave identifies a trap setup with Bitcoin potentially dumping 10% before reaching $85K, suggesting near-term downside before continuation higher.
signals.chart_pattern: trap setup, potential dump before breakout

signals.name: Top Altcoins
signals.reason: Top altcoins showing independent strength and not waiting for Bitcoin confirmation, suggesting relative outperformance.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Below key EMAs at $2,322–$2,345 acting as resistance despite bullish fundamentals like high Binance buy ratio and record smart contract deployments.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Caught in tug-of-war between safe-haven demand and oil-driven inflation pressure.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Bullish above $103 driven by ongoing geopolitical supply shock, consolidating in $105–$115 range.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: Neutral-to-bullish while holding above 1.1659, supported by shifting rate differentials awaiting NFP data.
